results.description: Baseline — original skill from verbose variant

bar-chart: has-svg (D3 creates SVG dynamically, not in static HTML)
bar-count (rects created at runtime, not in source)
line-chart: has-svg (D3 creates SVG dynamically, not in static HTML)
has-path (path created at runtime, not in source)

results.description: Rewrote skill to instruct static SVG output — all SVG elements written directly in HTML body instead of generated by JavaScript at runtime

line-chart: date-formatting (model wrote 'Jan 01' without year, test requires '2026')

changes: Added CRITICAL section explaining tests validate raw HTML source, not rendered page
Replaced all D3 append/join patterns with static SVG element examples
Added explicit bar chart and line chart patterns with pre-computed positions
Added computing positions section with formulas for band, linear, and time scales

results.description: Added explicit year requirement for date labels
changes: Updated date label examples to include year (e.g. '2026-01-01' instead of 'Jan 01')
Added bold note: 'Date labels MUST include the year'

keyInsights: Tests validate static HTML source, not browser-rendered output — D3's dynamic element creation (append/join) produces elements invisible to source-level tests
Skill must instruct model to write SVG elements as static HTML markup with pre-computed positions
Date axis labels must include the year to pass date-formatting tests
qwen3-30b follows prescriptive patterns well — providing complete static SVG examples in the skill produces reliable results
